title: Souls & Bones
body:
![Souls And Bones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e3b01a1145dea4d937c9d59d1bc68f07e147e8.png)

**SOULS & BONES** is a Mod that adds following features:
- Soul Magma
- Suspicious Soul Sand
- Placeable Bones
- Soul Sandstone
- Soul Sandstone Stairs
- Soul Sandstone Slab
- Soul Sandstone wall
- Cut Soul Sandstone
- Cut Soul Sandstone Slab
- Smooth Soul Sandstone
- Smooth Soul Sandstone Stairs
- Smooth Soul Sandstone Slab
- Chiseled Soul Sandstone
- Bone Bricks
- Bone brick Stairs
- Bone Brick Slab
- Bone Brick Wall

**Changed Magma Recipe** to 2 Magma Creams and 2 Netherrack,
You can craft/stonecut/smelt **Every Variant** of Soul Sandstone same as regular Sandstone.
